plan.description: Plan architecture, break down features, design implementation strategy

build.description: Implement features, write code, run tests — orchestrates backend_dev, frontend_dev, ai_engineer

explore.description: Quick codebase exploration, search files, understand project structure

general.description: General-purpose tasks, research, multi-step problem solving

project_lead.description: Project Lead and Architect — coordinates all development activities, maintains architectural integrity, orchestrates primary . Enforces Modular Monolith principles, manages cross-module communication via Service Interfaces. References: .opencode/agents/project_lead.md

planner.description: Project Planner — sprint planning, task breakdown, dependency mapping, milestone tracking. Translates 4-phase roadmap into concrete sprint plans with deliverables. References: .opencode/agents/planner/planner.md

backend_dev.description: Senior Backend Developer — Spring Boot 3 / Java 21, MongoDB, JWT, BCrypt. Implements auth, user_profile, food_catalog, meal_tracking, nutrition_plan, dashboard, admin modules. Enforces Controller→Service→Repository pattern, zero cross-module repository access. References: .opencode/agents/backend/backend_dev.md

react_native_dev.description: React-Native Developer — React-Native (TypeScript), Redux Toolkit/Zustand, React Native Paper. Builds mobile client for Android/iOS with calorie tracking dashboards. References: .opencode/agents/front-end/react_native_dev.md

react_dev.description: React Developer — React 18+ TypeScript only, Redux Toolkit, React Router v6, Axios, Ant Design, Tailwind CSS. Builds Admin Dashboard with functional components and hooks. References: .opencode/agents/front-end/react_dev.md

reviewer.description: Code Reviewer — enforces Modular Monolith principles, security (JWT, BCrypt, RBAC), performance (< 2s API response), clean code, >80% test coverage. Reviews Backend, Frontend, AI Service. References: .opencode/agents/quality-assurance/reviewer.md

docs_writer.description: Technical Writer — maintains project memory, API docs, architecture docs, decision logs, meeting notes, release notes. Updates .opencode/context/ specs and HISTORY_PROMPTS.md. References: .opencode/agents/documentation/docs_writer.md
